body.content:
{"title":"Daily AI Info (1/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"News"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"要闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Claude Code 上线 Agent view 功能并新增 /goal 指令"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Claude 宣布在 Claude Code 中推出 Agent view 研究预览版，用户可通过运行 claude agents 命令，在单一界面集中调度和查看多个并行会话。伴随发布的新版本还引入了 /goal 等新指令。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/blog/agent-view-in-claude-code","text":"https://claude.com/blog/agent-view-in-claude-code"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"模型发布"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Thinking Machines Lab 发布实时多模态“交互模型” TML-Interaction-Small"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Thinking Machines Lab 发布 Interaction Models 研究预览，公布了一种原生支持实时多模态人机协作的模型 TML-Interaction-Small ，并称其在智能与交互性上达到当前最优水平，未来数月将开放有限研究预览。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/interaction-models/","text":"https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/interaction-models/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenBMB 发布开源多模态模型 MiniCPM-V 4.6"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenBMB 发布并开源了 1.3B 参数量的端侧多模态大模型 MiniCPM-V 4.6 。官方称该模型在多项基准测试中击败了 Qwen3.5-0.8B ，原生支持在 iOS、Android 和 HarmonyOS 手机端运行。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-V-4.6","text":"https://huggingface.co/openbmb/MiniCPM-V-4.6"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"开发生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Anthropic 推出 Claude Platform on AWS"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Anthropic 宣布 Claude Platform on AWS 现已正式上线。 AWS 客户可通过现有凭证和统一账单直接访问全套原生 Claude API ，该服务由 Anthropic 运营。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://claude.com/blog/claude-platform-on-aws","text":"https://claude.com/blog/claude-platform-on-aws"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 为 Codex 推出 OpenAI Developers 插件"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI Developers 宣布， Codex 现可通过 OpenAI Developers 插件，协助开发者使用 OpenAI APIs 更快地构建 AI 应用与 Agent。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/OpenAIDevs/status/2053925962287583379","text":"https://x.com/OpenAIDevs/status/2053925962287583379"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenCode 宣布 DeepSeek V4 Flash 开启限时免费"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenCode 宣布 DeepSeek V4 Flash 开启限时免费活动，用户现可免费调用体验。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/opencode/status/2053887208688431179","text":"https://x.com/opencode/status/2053887208688431179"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Nous Portal 宣布限时免费提供 Qwen 3.6 Plus 模型"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Nous Research 宣布，由 阿里 推出的 Qwen 3.6 Plus 现已在 Nous Portal 平台限时免费开放。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/NousResearch/status/2053876496045920601","text":"https://x.com/NousResearch/status/2053876496045920601"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Windsurf 面向付费用户将 Kimi K2.6 免费期再延长一个月"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Windsurf 宣布，因推广期间反响热烈，将 Kimi K2.6 对付费用户的免费使用期再延长一个月。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://x.com/windsurf/status/2053895578946531518","text":"https://x.com/windsurf/status/2053895578946531518"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"产品应用"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"千问与淘宝全面打通，开启AI购物体验"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
阿里 宣布，淘宝“ AI 低价帮抢”功能接入了支付宝“ AI 付”能力，同时千问 App 也与淘宝全面打通，用户可在千问内完成商品挑选、比价并下单。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/10VoJmPCkk4yOm2fJLk0EQ","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/10VoJmPCkk4yOm2fJLk0EQ"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"QClaw 发布「文件空间」功能，打通腾讯文档与 ima 知识库"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
QClaw 宣布上线「文件空间」功能，通过与 腾讯文档 和 ima 知识库的深度打通，实现文件的一站式管理与 AI 协作。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/AgmVAhSl7BNSGxE0FBqa1g","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/AgmVAhSl7BNSGxE0FBqa1g"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"技术与洞察"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"11. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Artificial Analysis 发布 Coding Agent Index 评测模型与工具组合"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Artificial Analysis 发布 Coding Agent Index ，评测“模型 + 编程工具”组合。官方数据显示， Opus 4.7 搭配 Cursor CLI 以 61 分 取得最高分。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://artificialanalysis.ai/agents/coding-agents","text":"https://artificialanalysis.ai/agents/coding-agents"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"12. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Google 发布报告称首次发现攻击者利用 AI 开发零日漏洞"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Google 威胁情报小组发布报告称，首次发现攻击者利用据信由 AI 开发的零日漏洞策划大规模攻击，其主动防御措施可能已成功阻止该计划。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/ai-vulnerability-exploitation-initial-access","text":"https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/ai-vulnerability-exploitation-initial-access"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"行业动态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"13. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 推出 Daybreak 网络安全愿景"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 发布 Daybreak 网络安全愿景，整合 GPT-5.5 与 Codex Security ，通过威胁建模加速漏洞的发现与修复，并面向防御分析、红队测试等场景提供分级模型访问。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/daybreak/","text":"https://openai.com/daybreak/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"14. "},{"tag":"text","text":"OpenAI 成立 OpenAI Deployment Company"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
OpenAI 宣布成立由其控股的 OpenAI Deployment Company 。该公司获超 40 亿美元 初始投资，将通过外派工程师模式，协助企业将前沿 AI 模型转化为实际生产力。目前已达成收购 Tomoro 的协议，首批将引入约 150 名 资深部署专家。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://openai.com/index/openai-launches-the-deployment-company/","text":"https://openai.com/index/openai-launches-the-deployment-company/"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"15. "},{"tag":"text","text":"MiniMax 发起 10x Team 计划招募行业专家"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
MiniMax 发起 " 10x Team " 计划招募行业专家，合作构建 AI 评测与工作流。官方提供多模态模型及无限 Token ，支持全职或至少 4 个月的线下协作。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/G3m2xksI2jHAROhNdP7x2Q","text":"https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/G3m2xksI2jHAROhNdP7x2Q"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"16. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Qwen 官宣全球 Ambassador 计划并招募开发者与活动大使"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Qwen 官方宣布招募全球开发者与活动大使。入选者可获模型内测资格与每月最高 100 美元 API 额度，需完成对应的月度考核任务。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://qwen.ai/ambassador","text":"https://qwen.ai/ambassador"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"17. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Unsloth 宣布正式加入 PyTorch 生态"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Unsloth 宣布正式加入 PyTorch 生态。该团队表示，加入生态后项目路线保持不变，将继续维持开源并按计划推出桌面端应用。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://unsloth.ai/blog/pytorch","text":"https://unsloth.ai/blog/pytorch"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"前瞻与传闻"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"18. "},{"tag":"text","text":"消息称快手计划分拆可灵AI，寻求200亿美元估值IPO"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"摘要:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
据报道， 快手 计划分拆视频生成业务" 可灵AI "为明年的潜在 IPO 做准备，目前正寻求估值高达 200亿美元 的上市前融资。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Original Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://zhidx.com/p/557037.html","text":"https://zhidx.com/p/557037.html"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Paper"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"1. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Spatial Priming Outperforms Semantic Prompting: A Grid-Based Approach to Improving LLM Accuracy on Chart Data Extraction"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文发现对于多模态LLM的图表数据提取，叠加坐标网格的空间引导比语义提示更有效，在合成数据集上将SMAPE从25.5%降至19.5%，为改进产品中的图表理解提供简单方法。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08220","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08220"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"2. "},{"tag":"text","text":"BoostAPR: Boosting Automated Program Repair via Execution-Grounded Reinforcement Learning with Dual Reward Models"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
BoostAPR通过三阶段框架（执行验证监督微调、训练序列级和行级双奖励模型、PPO优化）实现自动化程序修复，其中行级信用分配根据执行结果精确指认关键编辑行；在SWE-bench Verified达到40.7%，大幅超越基座模型，并展现跨语言泛化能力。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09134","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09134"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"3. "},{"tag":"text","text":"UxSID: Semantic-Aware User Interests Modeling for Ultra-Long Sequence"}]]}

{"title":"Daily AI Info (2/2)","elements":[[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
UxSID利用语义ID和双级注意力策略构建语义组共享兴趣记忆，在超长用户序列建模中平衡效率与效果，通过大规模广告A/B测试获得0.337%收入提升，适用于推荐系统等产品。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09040","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09040"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"4. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Not All Turns Matter: Credit Assignment for Multi-Turn Jailbreaking"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
TRACE框架针对多轮越狱攻击中的信用分配问题，通过成功轨迹的留一话轮语义掩码和失败轨迹的惩罚细化（考虑危害度、语义相关性和拒绝感知），实现话轮级贡献估计，并复用攻击端信号进行防御对齐；攻击成功率相对最强RL基线提升约25%，防御时安全性与实用性平衡更佳。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08778","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08778"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"5. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Ace-Skill: Bootstrapping Multimodal Agents with Prioritized and Clustered Evolution"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Ace-Skill提出优先采样与语义聚类联合的自演化框架，在四个多模态工具使用基准上将开源35B MoE模型性能提升至比肩闭源模型，且技能可零样本迁移至小模型，代码已公开。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08887","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08887"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"6. "},{"tag":"text","text":"The Attacker in the Mirror: Breaking Self-Consistency in Safety via Anchored Bipolicy Self-Play"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文提出锚定双策略自我博弈方法，通过在冻结基座上训练独立LoRA适配器来打破自我一致性，显著提升模型安全性而不损失推理能力，并在多个安全基准上验证有效性。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08427","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08427"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"7. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Self-ReSET: Learning to Self-Recover from Unsafe Reasoning Trajectories"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
Self-ReSET提出纯强化学习框架，让大推理模型从自身产生的不安全推理轨迹中学习自我恢复，无需静态专家数据；在多种模型和越狱攻击基准上显著提升对抗鲁棒性，同时保持通用能力，并开源代码。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08936","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08936"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"8. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Containment Verification: AI Safety Guarantees Independent of Alignment"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文提出包容性验证方法，将AI视为无约束预言机，在智能体框架层嵌入验证保证安全，并用Dafny形式化验证了PocketFlow，首次实现智能体框架的演绎式形式化证明。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09045","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09045"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"9. "},{"tag":"text","text":"Where Reliability Lives in Vision-Language Models: A Mechanistic Study of Attention, Hidden States, and Causal Circuits"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
该论文通过统一机制流水线分析三个开放权重视觉语言模型家族，发现注意力图清晰度无法预测回答正确性，而隐藏状态几何和自一致性是更强指标，并揭示不同融合架构的可靠性分布差异。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08200","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08200"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"10. "},{"tag":"text","text":"RewardHarness: Self-Evolving Agentic Post-Training"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Publish Date:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
2026-05-12"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"一句话总结:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
RewardHarness用自演化智能体迭代构建工具与技能库，仅凭100个偏好示例即可在图像编辑评估中超越GPT-5 5.3个百分点，并可作为GRPO微调的奖励信号。"}],[{"tag":"hr"}],[{"tag":"text","text":"Link:"},{"tag":"text","text":"
"},{"tag":"a","href":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08703","text":"https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08703"}]]}
